category_sources: Official GitLab project homepage is the source project for enter-tex: source_facts.homepage.
display_name_sources: Current upstream references use the display name Enter TeX for the TeX/LaTeX editor.
Project name inferred from source_facts.name enter-tex and official GitLab project path.
docs_sources: Search results identify an official GitLab docs/more-information.md page for Enter TeX.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitLab project page and best available official documentation surface in the input.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://gitlab.gnome.org/swilmet/enter-tex; per instruction, repo returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.homepage is a GNOME GitLab project, and package metadata identifies enter-tex as a GNOME TeX/LaTeX editor.
